title.description: App-ip aqqa header-imi takuneqarsinnaasoq. Nunarsuarmi nerisassat ilisimatitsinerannut app-i.

heroTitle.description: Aningaasaqarnermut ullut akornanni hero immikkoortortaq qitiuvoq.

heroSubtitle.description: Hero qitiuvoq kingusinnerusoq subtitle-tut takuneqarsinnaasoq ullut akornanni.

featuredTitle.description: Nerisassat kortit qitiuvoq takuneqarsinnaasoq immikkoortortaq qitiuvoq.

cookingTime.description: Nerisassat kortimi atortut atorlugit ukiunik paasissutissiisoq. {minutes} ukiunut allanngortinneqassaaq.

ramenDescription.text: Aqutsineqartartoq qaammatit iluanni nerisassat, chashu qernertut, qeqqussut qernertut, aammalu nillataq nutaaq.

margheritaDescription.text: San Marzano atorsinnaasut, mozzarella nutaaq, aamma basil qernertut, Neapolitan pizza klassik.

tacosDescription.text: Marineret porki tacos, annanas, cilantro, aamma qarasaasiaq corn tortillas-imi.

butterChickenDescription.text: Qimussimik qaqugu, tomatomi, qimussimik saasiaq, aamma aaliangersimasunik aserorsimallutik.

padThaiDescription.text: Qaqqap qernertup, tofu, peanuts, tamarind saasiaq, sorlermi qernertut nerisassat.

crepesDescription.text: Nutella, nutaaq strawberry, aamma qernertut qernertut, qernertut crepes.

label.description: Header-imi oqaasii allanngortinneqartarnissaat atorlugu accessible label.
